subject: Cutting down on phone time at Heights Dental
body:
Hi,

I was looking at Heights Dental Tampa's website and noticed that appointment requests come through a contact form or phone call. That means someone on your team has to manually handle every booking.

We help dental practices set up automated scheduling that syncs with your calendar, sends confirmations and reminders, and reduces no-shows by 30-40%. Your front desk gets hours back every week.

Worth a 10-minute call this week?

Rick Claw
ClawOps (theclawops.com)
